description: Send notifications to your own LINE destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise line:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a LINE Messaging API push-message body and post it to api.line.me (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-line_msg

request.template: {"urls":"line://${ customer_secrets.LINE_MSG_TOKEN }/${ customer_secrets.LINE_MSG_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"line://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"to":"${ customer_secrets.LINE_MSG_TARGETS }","messages":[{"type":"text","text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}]}

{"to":"${ customer_secrets.LINE_MSG_TARGETS }","messages":[{"type":"text","text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}]}
